case_title: VINCENT PLASTIC INC. VS FONG, SAMUEL W. DBA 32ND & NORIEGA PRODUCE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VINCENT PLASTIC INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FONG, SAMUEL W. DBA 32ND & NORIEGA PRODUCE CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SPLIT CLAIM SEE CASE #809588. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
